icuPlaceholders.description: Whether to use ICU placeholder visualization in the editor and it's support.

suggestionsMode.description: Suggestions can be DISABLED (hidden from UI) or ENABLED (visible in the UI)

translationProtection.description: Protects reviewed translations, so translators can't change them by default and others will receive warning.

unassignConflictingTms.description: When true, the request is allowed to unassign shared translation memories whose source language differs from the new base language. Without this flag, such a conflict is rejected with `cannot_change_project_base_language_tm_conflict`. The frontend should only set this after the user explicitly confirms in the conflict dialog.
